content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView routes 4–5 star raters to a direct `itms-apps://...write-review` link while diverting <4 star raters to a private feedback form, and the description says "rate us 5 stars!" (App/RatingGateView.swift:23-28; description.txt:1)
Pierre: Apple treats review gating as a dark pattern — you must not filter which users reach the App Store based on sentiment, and you should use `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` / `RequestReviewAction` rather than a custom star UI plus a direct write-review URL. Here the code explicitly sends happy users to the store and unhappy users elsewhere, and the description solicits 5-star ratings, both of which violate 5.6.1/5.6.3. Replace the custom gate with the system review API, remove the sentiment branching, and drop the "rate us 5 stars" copy from the description.
